query.text: declare @unit varchar(128), @status nvarchar(8), @masterKey nvarchar(128) select @masterKey = '%#10$' + rtrim(@ma_kh) + case when @loai_ct = '1' then '%#15$1%#25$1' else '%#15$2%#25$1' end + '%#30$' + rtrim(@ma_nt) + '%', @unit = case when @ma_dvcs = '' then @@unit else @ma_dvcs end &FilterInitialize;&CheckRelativeProcess; exec FastBusiness$App$Voucher$Finding 'BPT', 'c57$000000', 'm57$', 'i57$', 'ngay_ct', 'convert(char(6), {0}, 112)', 'dateadd(month, 1, {0})', '000000', @@refresh, @@pageIndex, @@pageCount, @@lastPage, @@lastCount, @@firstItem, @@lastItem, @masterKey, '', 'stt_rec', 'so_ct,stt_rec,ngay_ct,t_tien_nt,ma_nt,status', 'so_ct,stt_rec,ngay_ct,t_tien_nt,ma_nt,a.status,b.statusname%l u0%l', 'a left join dmttct b on a.status = b.status where b.ma_ct = ''BPT''', 'ngay_ct, so_ct', 1, @@userID, 1, @ngay_ct1, @ngay_ct2, '', '', '2', '0', @unit, 0, 1, default, default, default, default, default, @$primeJoin, @$primeFilter
